claims.text: Hoi3DGen generates high-quality textured meshes of human-object interaction.
claims.source_quote: We introduce Hoi3DGen, a framework that generates high-quality textured meshes of human-object interaction that follow the input interaction descriptions precisely.

claims.text: Existing approaches for 3D human-object interaction generation often rely on score distillation from text-to-image models.
claims.source_quote: Existing approaches often rely on score distillation from text-to-image models, but their results suffer from the Janus problem and do not follow text prompts faithfully due to the scarcity of high-quality interaction data.

claims.text: Existing approaches that rely on score distillation from text-to-image models suffer from the Janus problem.
claims.source_quote: Existing approaches often rely on score distillation from text-to-image models, but their results suffer from the Janus problem and do not follow text prompts faithfully due to the scarcity of high-quality interaction data.

claims.text: Existing approaches do not follow text prompts faithfully due to the scarcity of high-quality interaction data.
claims.source_quote: their results suffer from the Janus problem and do not follow text prompts faithfully due to the scarcity of high-quality interaction data.

claims.text: Hoi3DGen curates realistic and high-quality interaction data leveraging multimodal large language models.
claims.source_quote: We first curate realistic and high-quality interaction data leveraging multimodal large language models, and then create a full text-to-3D pipeline

claims.text: Hoi3DGen creates a full text-to-3D pipeline for human-object interaction generation.
claims.source_quote: We first curate realistic and high-quality interaction data leveraging multimodal large language models, and then create a full text-to-3D pipeline, which achieves orders-of-magnitude improvements in interaction fidelity.

claims.text: Hoi3DGen achieves orders-of-magnitude improvements in interaction fidelity compared to prior approaches.
claims.source_quote: which achieves orders-of-magnitude improvements in interaction fidelity.

claims.text: Hoi3DGen surpasses baselines by 4-15x in text consistency.
claims.source_quote: Our method surpasses baselines by 4-15x in text consistency and 3-7x in 3D model quality

claims.text: Hoi3DGen surpasses baselines by 3-7x in 3D model quality.
claims.source_quote: Our method surpasses baselines by 4-15x in text consistency and 3-7x in 3D model quality

claims.text: Hoi3DGen exhibits strong generalization to diverse categories and interaction types.
claims.source_quote: exhibiting strong generalization to diverse categories and interaction types, while maintaining high-quality 3D generation.

claims.text: Modeling and generating 3D human-object interactions from text is crucial for applications in AR, XR, and gaming.
claims.source_quote: Modeling and generating 3D human-object interactions from text is crucial for applications in AR, XR, and gaming.
